headline: Jim Cramer on McCormick CEO: “I Didn’t Press Him on the Cost, Which Was Pretty High”
summary: McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC) is among Jim Cramer’s recent stock calls as he urged investors to stand by the defense sector. Cramer discussed the company’s acquisition of food brands from Unilever, as he commented: I want to contrast that with how I handled myself the previous day with Brendan Foley, the CEO of McCormick, […]
